overall.description: A third-person perspective follows a character walking through a rainy nighttime city intersection with wet, reflective streets. The scene features illuminated skyscrapers, traffic signals, and passing vehicles, rendered in high-quality game engine graphics typical of open-world urban environments.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the wet crosswalk toward the traffic island corner

entered.detail: tall pole with red traffic signals illuminated, rain falling around it
painted white lines on wet asphalt reflecting street lights
low-rise building with arched entrance and warm interior lighting
tall illuminated skyscrapers with scattered window lights in the background
rain-slicked asphalt with reflections of street lamps and building lights

segments.scene_description: The character walks across a rain-soaked city intersection at night, with red traffic lights overhead and a commercial building visible to the left. The wet pavement reflects the artificial lighting from street lamps and distant skyscrapers.

events.description: character stops walking and waits at the corner traffic island

agents.ego_description: pausing at the corner of the intersection, looking around before proceeding

segments.scene_description: The character stops at the traffic island corner, with the traffic light structure now visible to the right. The camera remains relatively stationary as the character surveys the intersection before continuing.

scene_state.functional_zone: open intersection crossing with vehicle traffic

events.description: white sedan drives through the intersection from left to right

agents.ego_description: continuing across the intersection as a vehicle passes through the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving through the wet intersection, splashing water

entered.detail: white four-door sedan with brake lights on, moving through the crosswalk
tall street light illuminating the rainy intersection from the left side

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds across the open intersection as a white sedan drives through from left to right. The traffic light and commercial building are left behind as the character moves toward the opposite sidewalk, with street lamps visible on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked city intersection at night, transitioning from a close-up walk past commercial buildings to an open crossing of the wet streets. It begins with the character moving across the pavement, where the ground reflects the red glow of overhead traffic lights and the artificial shimmer of distant skyscrapers. As the character reaches the corner of a traffic island, the camera slows to a brief pause, shifting the perspective to bring the traffic light structure into view on the right. The scene then opens up as the character proceeds across the wide intersection, passing a white sedan driving from left to right. Finally, the camera moves away from the commercial buildings and traffic signals, following the character toward the opposite sidewalk under the glow of street lamps.
